# Fragkosiko (Φραγκόσυκο)

> Fragkosiko is a hidden garden restaurant, café, and cocktail bar located in the heart of Naxos Town, Cyclades, Greece. Open daily from 8:00 AM to midnight. Named after the prickly pear cactus (φραγκόσυκο), a symbol of the Greek islands.

## About

Fragkosiko is a beloved local spot in Naxos, Greece, tucked inside a whitewashed Cycladic courtyard garden. It serves artisanal brunch and coffee by day, and signature cocktails and a full food menu by evening. It celebrates local Naxian ingredients, traditional Greek flavors, and warm Mediterranean hospitality.

Co-founders: Dimitris Molindris (Head Chef), Christos Lagios (Bar Manager), Christos Oikonomou (Operations).
